name: Frische Tomatensuppe (Fresh Tomato Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tomatoes into wedges and place them in a 1 1/2-quart saucepan with all ingredients except yogurt.
2. Simmer uncovered for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Strain the mixture through a fine-mesh sieve to remove tomato skins and seeds.
4. Adjust seasonings as needed.
5. Garnish with spoonfuls of yogurt before serving.
